stemHtml: The initial call of an aircraft starts with “Swiss Radar, Flyer 311 Super…”. Why is the word 'Super added' to the call sign?

options.a: It is an ambulance flight requesting priority due to the critical condition of the patient.
options.b: The type of that aircraft is listed as 'Super' by the competent authority.
options.c: The maximum take off mass of that aircraft is 137 tonnes or more.
options.d: The relevant aircraft is capable of cruising at supersonic speeds.
